description: Using the UrbanSim dataset for San Francisco, simulate a land value capture policy by identifying the top 5 zones with the highest employment and modeling a 2.5 Max FAR upzoning. For parcels in these zones, calculate the real estate value uplift based on property values (using residential sales prices) and entitled square footage (assuming a baseline Max FAR of 1.0 for missing data). Project a 25% betterment levy revenue from the calculated uplift. Export the aggregated results by zone to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/lvc_revenue_by_zone.csv with columns: zone_id, total_parcels_assessed, total_value_uplift, and projected_levy_revenue. Save a bar chart of the projected levy revenue by zone to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/lvc_revenue_chart.png. Perform this analysis using the notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/lvc_analysis.ipynb with data from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5.
